description:
The table displays attribute data for geospatial features from the dataset "AT005L3_INNSBRUCK_UA2018_v012". The header indicates "Features Total: 12068, Filtered: 12068, Selected: 0".

The table provides a sample of 11 records from the Urban Atlas 2018 dataset for Innsbruck, Austria, showing feature IDs, country code (AT for Austria), Functional Urban Area (FUA) name and code, the specific 2018 land use/land cover code and its descriptive class, and the production date of the data (2020-08). The most frequent land cover classes in this sample are "Discontinuous urban fabric" and "Industrial, commercial and transport units".
